summary: Iteration 5 - Content Depth Verification Complete. All features tested and working: Warrior Practices with detailed_instructions (how_to_do_it steps, common_mistakes, progression, safety), Meal Plan with 30 full recipes (ingredients, method, tip), Translator live chat interface, DoctrinesPanel with expanded views, Vel'nar Language Guide with all 8 tabs. Backend: 40/40 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: GET /api/warrior/practices returns 4 disciplines (iaido, kyudo, systema, throwing_daggers)
Iaido has 5 stages with detailed_instructions in each stage
detailed_instructions contain skill, what_it_is, how_to_do_it (array of strings)
detailed_instructions contain common_mistakes, progression, beginner_note, safety where applicable
Equipment section has sourcing info and care instructions
Stage buttons (Stage 1-5) navigate between stages correctly
Requirements checklist with toggle functionality works
Workout logging dialog opens with exercises, sets, reps inputs
GET /api/meals/plan returns 30 recipes with full data
Each recipe has ingredients array, method array, cost, tip, serves
Meal Plan Day 1 shows 3 meals (Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner)
Expanded recipe shows Ingredients list, Method steps, Tip with lightbulb icon
Week navigation (< Week 1 >) works across 5 weeks
All Recipes tab categorizes by breakfast/lunch/dinner
Strategy tab shows batch cooking strategy and budget tips
Translator is a chat interface with messages, not single input/output
Translator settings gear shows MBTI type selectors and direction toggle
Translator AI translation works (INTJ to ESFJ adaptation)
DoctrinesPanel opens from sidebar, shows 6 doctrine cards
Clicking a doctrine shows full_text, vel_nar_form, pronunciation, when_to_use
GET /api/doctrines/expanded returns 6 doctrines with full content
The Litany has line_by_line array
Vel'nar Language Guide all 8 tabs work (Roots, Sound, Formation, Phrases, Shadow Lexicon, Rite, Stages, Script)
GET /api/velnar/language-guide returns root_houses (6), core_roots (12), heart_phrases, shadow_lexicon (8), rite_phrases, stage_path (5), script_system
All 15 navigation links work correctly
Dashboard loads correctly with recipe names (not objects)
seed_data_creation: None - using existing data from warrior_practices_full.py, meal_plan_full.py, expanded_doctrines.py, velnar_language.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 verified the DEPTH of content as requested. Key verifications: 1) Warrior Practices now have detailed_instructions with how_to_do_it arrays (numbered steps), common_mistakes, progression, beginner_note, safety fields - all rendering correctly in expandable SkillBlock components. 2) Meal Plan has 30 full recipes with ingredients array, method array, cost, tip - all expandable in RecipeCard components. 3) Translator is now a live chat interface (not single input/output) with MBTI type selectors and direction toggle. 4) DoctrinesPanel shows full expanded doctrine views with Vel'nar form, pronunciation, when-to-use. 5) Vel'nar Language Guide has all 8 tabs working. The user complaint about 'just checklists with no instructions' has been fully addressed - detailed walkthrough content is now visible and functional.
